summary: Complete package wiring cleanup: pruned 4 dead packages (memory-bus, goraphdb-bridge, shared-orchestration, model-sync) with pattern extraction; fixed buildManifestFromConfig args leak; added DCP/Distill wiring test; created bootstrap.js singleton + bootstrap-runtime.mjs entry point; cleaned model-router-x phantom deps; wired errors, logger, runbooks, plugin-preload-skills into integration-layer; added E2E bootstrap smoke test. 66 tests pass, 0 fail.
